name: Don Cherry
abstract: Donald Eugene Cherry (November 18, 1936 – October 19, 1995) was an American jazz trumpeter, bandleader, and multi-instrumentalist. Beginning in the late 1950s, he had a long tenure performing in the bands of saxophonist Ornette Coleman, including on the pioneering free jazz albums The Shape of Jazz to Come (1959) and Free Jazz: A Collect…

about_quotes.speaker: Sheila Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: So Mark was on it―Mark Murphy, myself, Dee Dee Bridgewater and Don Cherry. ... we rehearsed this jazz opera, and uh, I really got to know Don Cherry then.

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Stewart
about_quotes.evidence: It was taught to me by Don Cherry when I worked with Don Cherry.
